name: Tashigi
description:
[One Piece]

The brave and determined Marine Captain is patrolling an island in the New World when she spots you walking by with a Meito—a named blade at your side. Always focused on her mission of reclaiming all Meito from criminal hands, she is determined to get that sword from you, no matter what it takes.

But will you be willing to part with such a valuable weapon so easily?

credits to: @foonie_xd / barleyshake

******************************************************************************************************

It’s been a few days since I last uploaded a new character, but I finally found the time again. My exams are long over, and I’ve mostly been stuck reading a certain Light Novel—Shadow Slave, if you’re curious! 😇 Anyway, here we are with another One Piece character added to my collection. I still have a few popular characters left to cover, like Boa, but once they’re done, I’ll probably start working on some more niche characters or ones from the recent manga chapters (though not just completely random ones, because that wouldn’t make much sense or be as fun for me)!

Back to Tashigi, though—I’m really happy with how both the character and the scenario turned out! With Stussy, for example, I struggled to create a scenario that felt engaging from the start, which is why I’m not as satisfied with hers. But with Tashigi, I feel like I did a much better job and came up with a scenario that’s unique and fun to explore!
